result.stdout:
Unknown action: '--help'

Service testing tool for load testing, environment comparison, response testing, and integration testing microservices.

Usage - fenrir <action> -options

GlobalOption   Description
Help (-?)      Shows this help

Actions

  Simple <Url> -options - Run simple load

    Option             Description
    Url* (-u)          load test url
    Concurrency (-t)   number of parallel threads to use [Default='1'] 
    Count (-c)         number requests to make [Default='-1'] 

  List  - List generator plugins


  Generator <Name> -options - Generate requests using request plugin

    Option                Description
    Name* (-n)            generator name
    Arguments (-a)        generator arguments
    Concurrency (-t)      number of parallel threads to use [Default='1'] 
    OutputFilePath (-o)   path to output file

  Request -options - Generate requests from file or pipe

    Option                 Description
    RequestFilePath (-f)   path to request tree file
    Concurrency (-t)       number of parallel threads to use [Default='1'] 
    OutputFilePath (-o)    path to output file

Examples

    simple load test example - 
    fenrir simple -url "https://example.domain/resource/1" -t 100 -c 10000

    file request tree example - 
    fenrir request -f "requestjsonfile.json" -t 100

    Generator plugin example - user created generators with options
    fenrir generator "Generator Plugin Name" -a "#pluginOption" "pluginOptionValue" -t 100
